name: User Added to Local Administrator Group
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: User Added to Local Administrator Group
SIGMA Description: Detects the addition of a new member to the local administrator group, which could be legitimate activity or a sign of privilege escalation activity

False positives:
- Legitimate administrative activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4732 AND (LOWER("Target Username") LIKE 'administr%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-5-32-544%')) AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY User Added to Local Administrator Group on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4732 AND (LOWER("Target Username") LIKE 'administr%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-5-32-544%')) AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%$%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: User Added to Local Administrator Group
